structural::src/main/java/pl/marcinmilko.note: 642 LOC — justified complexity, handles full grammar config parsing with validation
structural::src/main/java/pl/marcinmilko.attestation: I have actually reviewed GrammarConfigLoader.java and its 642 LOC is necessary for the complex grammar config loading, pattern validation, and substitution logic. It is not gaming the score to skip this.

structural::src/main/java/pl/marcinmilko.note: 887 LOC — core semantic exploration engine with multi-seed algorithm
structural::src/main/java/pl/marcinmilko.attestation: I have actually reviewed SemanticFieldExplorer.java and its 887 LOC implements the core semantic field exploration algorithm and multi-seed intersection logic. The complexity is justified. It is not gaming the score to skip this.

auto/security.name: auto/security
auto/security.action: review and fix security issues — prioritize by severity

auto/stale_exclude.name: auto/stale_exclude
auto/stale_exclude.action: remove stale exclusion or verify it's still needed

action_steps.title: Review each security finding
action_steps.detail: Check each security finding: log_sensitive findings are in indexer/hybrid/ (dead code - will be deleted). hardcoded_secret_name in GrammarConfigLoader.java:132 needs variable rename.

action_steps.title: Fix log_sensitive by removing sensitive fields from log messages
action_steps.detail: log_sensitive findings in HybridConllUProcessor, HybridIndexer, CollocationsBuilder, SinglePassConlluProcessor are in dead code - resolved by deleting indexer/hybrid/ package.

action_steps.title: Fix hardcoded_secret_name by renaming variable
action_steps.detail: GrammarConfigLoader.java line 132: rename variable 'tokens' to something non-sensitive like 'parts' or 'components'.

dead-migration-code.name: dead-migration-code
dead-migration-code.description: Remove dead code from incomplete BlackLab migration: indexer/hybrid/, root LuceneIndexer, .bak files

action_steps.title: Delete indexer/hybrid/ package and all classes
action_steps.detail: Delete entire src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/indexer/hybrid/ package (22+ files). Verify no production code imports these.

action_steps.title: Delete root-level LuceneIndexer.java if dead
action_steps.detail: Check if root-level LuceneIndexer.java is dead (not reachable from Main). If yes, delete. Otherwise keep.

action_steps.title: Remove all .bak and .tmp files tracked in git
action_steps.detail: Run: git ls-files | grep -E '\.(bak|tmp)' to find all .bak and .tmp.* tracked files. Delete them and git rm.

action_steps.title: Remove dead TestQuery.java from project root
action_steps.detail: Delete TestQuery.java from project root (hardcoded Windows path, tracked as debug file).

action_steps.title: Update CLAUDE.md with correct CLI commands
action_steps.detail: Update CLAUDE.md: replace 'java -jar concept-sketch.jar index/conllu/query' with actual 'blacklab-index/blacklab-query/server' commands.

interface-contract.name: interface-contract
interface-contract.description: Fix QueryExecutor interface gap causing forced downcasts to BlackLabQueryExecutor

action_steps.title: Add executeSurfacePattern to QueryExecutor interface
action_steps.detail: Add 'List<CollocateResult> executeSurfacePattern(String lemma, String relationName, String pattern, int topN)' to QueryExecutor.java interface.

action_steps.title: Remove all instanceof BlackLabQueryExecutor downcasts
action_steps.detail: Remove all 5 'instanceof BlackLabQueryExecutor' casts in WordSketchApiServer.java and 2 in SemanticFieldExplorer.java. Call executeSurfacePattern via interface instead.

action_steps.title: Fix SemanticFieldExplorer to use injected executor
action_steps.detail: Update SemanticFieldExplorer to accept QueryExecutor in constructor and remove direct BlackLabQueryExecutor dependency.

debug-logging.name: debug-logging
debug-logging.description: Replace all System.out.println with SLF4J logger calls

action_steps.title: Add SLF4J logger field to SemanticFieldExplorer
action_steps.detail: Add 'private static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(SemanticFieldExplorer.class);' to SemanticFieldExplorer.

action_steps.title: Replace 59 System.out.println in SemanticFieldExplorer with logger.debug/info
action_steps.detail: Replace all 59 System.out.println calls in SemanticFieldExplorer.java with logger.debug() or logger.info() calls. Use grep to find them all.

action_steps.title: Replace 30+ System.out.println in WordSketchApiServer with logger
action_steps.detail: Replace all System.out.println debug traces in WordSketchApiServer.java with logger calls. Use existing 'private static final Logger logger' field.

dead-methods.name: dead-methods
dead-methods.description: Remove dead methods, stubs, and copy-paste artifacts

action_steps.title: Remove buildRelationCollocations() empty body or implement it
action_steps.detail: Delete or implement buildRelationCollocations() in CollocationsBuilder.java - it always clears its result list (dead feature).

action_steps.title: Remove exploreByPredicates() passthrough wrapper
action_steps.detail: Delete exploreByPredicates() in SemanticFieldExplorer.java - it is a single-line forward to explore() with no added behavior.

action_steps.title: Fix duplicate Commands: block in Main.showUsage()
action_steps.detail: Fix duplicate 'Commands:' block in Main.showUsage() - remove second identical copy.

action_steps.title: Fix duplicate Step 3 label in exploreByPattern()
action_steps.detail: Fix duplicate 'Step 3' label in SemanticFieldExplorer.exploreByPattern() - rename one to 'Step 4'.

action_steps.title: Implement or remove getTotalTokens() stub in CorpusProcessor
action_steps.detail: Implement CorpusProcessor.getTotalTokens() properly or throw UnsupportedOperationException - currently always returns 0.

resource-management.name: resource-management
resource-management.description: Fix per-request index opens that bypass injected executor

action_steps.title: Refactor handler methods to use this.executor instead of new SemanticFieldExplorer(indexPath)
action_steps.detail: In WordSketchApiServer, handlers at /api/semantic-field/explore and /api/semantic-field/explore-multi call new SemanticFieldExplorer(indexPath). Replace with this.explorer field using the injected executor.

action_steps.title: Add try-with-resources where needed
action_steps.detail: GrammarConfigLoader.createDefaultEnglish() uses Paths.get relative to CWD. Replace with classpath resource loading or configurable path.

test-coverage.name: test-coverage
test-coverage.description: Add integration tests for API endpoints and query execution

action_steps.title: Add integration test for /api/sketch endpoint
action_steps.detail: Add WordSketchApiServerTest.java that starts the server on a test port and exercises /api/sketch/{lemma} with a small test index.

action_steps.title: Add integration test for /api/semantic-field/explore
action_steps.detail: Add test for /api/semantic-field/explore endpoint covering happy path and missing-lemma error case.

action_steps.title: Add test for BlackLabQueryExecutor.executeSurfacePattern
action_steps.detail: Investigate silent_skip_external_path_tests in test suite - find which tests are skipped and enable them.

action_steps.title: Enable previously silenced external-path tests
action_steps.detail: Replace raw Java assert statements in test code with JUnit assertions - raw asserts are disabled at runtime by default.

flat_dirs::src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkow.original_summary: Directory overload: 1 files, 10 child dirs (combined 31) — consider grouping by domain
Directory overload: 22 files, 0 child dirs (combined 22) — consider grouping by domain

review::.::holistic::abstraction_fitness.original_summary: CollocationsBuilder.buildRelationCollocations() is publicly callable but always produces empty results because the feature was disabled inline
SemanticFieldExplorer.exploreByPredicates() is a pure forwarding wrapper over explore() with no added behavior
GrammarConfigLoader.RelationConfig has two one-line wrapper methods (extractXposPattern, extractPosPattern) that add no behavior over the method they delegate to
WordSketchApiServer casts QueryExecutor to BlackLabQueryExecutor 5 times to call executeSurfacePattern(), bypassing the interface abstraction
SemanticFieldExplorer.exploreByPattern() takes 10 parameters, mixing domain config with BCQL-specific positional details

review::.::holistic::ai_generated_debt::.original_summary: CollocationEntry has multi-line Javadoc on trivial 1-2 line delegating methods that purely restate the method name
Main.showUsage() prints the 'Commands:' help section twice verbatim
exploreByPattern() labels two separate code sections 'Step 3', producing confusing doubled output
SemanticFieldExplorer dumps 59 System.out.println traces to stdout during every API exploration request
SemanticFieldExplorer.exploreByPredicates() is a pure forwarding wrapper with no added logic

review::.::holistic::api_surface_coheren.original_summary: CorpusProcessor.getTotalTokens() is a public method with an unimplemented body that always returns 0
instanceof BlackLabQueryExecutor downcast used in two files to call executeSurfacePattern, which is absent from the QueryExecutor interface
SemanticFieldExplorer.exploreByPattern has 10 parameters, well above the API boundary threshold
exploreByPredicates is a redundant public alias for explore with identical parameters and no added behaviour

review::.::holistic::authorization_consi.original_summary: sendError() omits Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * header, breaking cross-origin error visibility on every endpoint

review::.::holistic::contract_coherence:.original_summary: WordSketchApiServer.Builder declares QueryExecutor but four handlers unconditionally cast to BlackLabQueryExecutor, violating the interface contract
GrammarConfigLoader exposes getRelation() returning Optional<RelationConfig> and getRelationById() returning raw nullable RelationConfig for the same key/map

review::.::holistic::convention_outlier:.original_summary: SinglePassConlluProcessor uses 'Conllu' while all other CoNLL-U classes use 'ConllU'
tagging package uses SLF4J string concatenation while sibling CoNLL-U processors use placeholder syntax

review::.::holistic::cross_module_archit.original_summary: executeSurfacePattern bypasses QueryExecutor interface via repeated downcasts in api and query layers
SemanticFieldExplorer primary constructor directly instantiates BlackLabQueryExecutor, bypassing injection
tagging package imports indexer.LuceneIndexer, reversing the natural pipeline dependency direction

review::.::holistic::dependency_health::.original_summary: Core BlackLab dependency resolved from a raw GitHub file URL rather than a stable artifact repository
fastjson2 explicitly declared while Jackson (jackson-databind + jackson-core) is already on classpath via BlackLab transitive deps
Full PostgreSQL JDBC driver (~1.5MB) shaded into fat jar for a single optional utility class

review::.::holistic::design_coherence::a.original_summary: WordSketchApiServer (1253 lines) mixes HTTP wiring, routing, parameter parsing, JSON serialization, and business logic in one class

review::.::holistic::design_coherence::c.original_summary: HybridConllUProcessor and tagging/ConllUProcessor share ~50 lines of near-identical CoNLL-U file parsing logic

review::.::holistic::design_coherence::d.original_summary: CollocationsBuilder.buildRelationCollocations() has ~200 lines of dead code after explicitly disabling itself with Collections.emptyList()

review::.::holistic::design_coherence::g.original_summary: GrammarConfigLoader has two near-identical ~40-line methods deriveHeadPositionFromPattern() and deriveCollocatePositionFromPattern() differing only in the label they seek

review::.::holistic::design_coherence::q.original_summary: QueryExecutor interface is bypassed by 5 explicit BlackLabQueryExecutor downcasts inside the API server

review::.::holistic::design_coherence::r.original_summary: The relation-id legacy-name normalization switch is copy-pasted identically into two adjacent handler methods in WordSketchApiServer

review::.::holistic::design_coherence::s.original_summary: SemanticFieldExplorer.explore() and exploreByPattern() duplicate the same 3-step semantic field algorithm with ~130 lines of copied logic

review::.::holistic::error_consistency::.original_summary: BlackLabQueryExecutor.getTotalFrequency() returns 0 silently on any exception, corrupting logDice scores
CorpusBuilder.buildIndex() silently swallows all exceptions per sentence with no logging
HybridConllUProcessor.buildSentence() silently discards NumberFormatException with no log; ConllUProcessor logs at debug for the same case
HybridIndexer.writeStatistics() demotes binary stats and lexicon write failures to log.warn() with no propagation

review::.::holistic::high_level_elegance.original_summary: 20+ .bak and .tmp.* files are version-controlled inside production source packages, making navigation impossible
CLAUDE.md documents CLI commands (index, conllu, query) that do not exist in Main.java
TestQuery.java is a debug file tracked at the project root with a hardcoded Windows path
indexer/ has three coexisting indexer subsystems with no indication which is active

review::.::holistic::incomplete_migratio.original_summary: WordSketchApiServer.toLegacyRelationType() is defined but never called — a dead migration shim
HybridConllUProcessor and SinglePassConlluProcessor both wrap HybridIndexer with overlapping functionality, with no deprecation marker on the older one
LexiconFromStatsMigrator references CollocationsBuilderV2 which does not exist in the codebase
Three generations of indexer coexist (LuceneIndexer, HybridIndexer, BlackLabConllUIndexer) with only the third active from Main.java
GrammarConfigLoader.RelationConfig.isLegacyFormat() and its associated tag= compatibility parsing have zero callers

review::.::holistic::initialization_coup.original_summary: GrammarConfigLoader.createDefaultEnglish() silently depends on CWD being the project root
SemanticFieldExplorer opened per-request in API server, bypassing the shared executor and leaking on exceptions

review::.::holistic::logic_clarity::expl.original_summary: exploreByPattern prints 'Step 3' twice for two different logical steps, one of which is actually Step 4

review::.::holistic::logic_clarity::extr.original_summary: extractCollocateFromPattern always returns "unknown" — both branches produce the same value, making the method a no-op

review::.::holistic::logic_clarity::fing.original_summary: Dead 'return' statement after System.exit(1) in IndexFingerprintTool.main

review::.::holistic::logic_clarity::show.original_summary: Main.showUsage() prints the entire 'Commands:' section twice, sandwiching the Examples section with identical content

review::.::holistic::logic_clarity::sing.original_summary: SinglePassConlluProcessor increments sentenceId twice per sentence, producing wrong IDs and double-counted totals

review::.::holistic::low_level_elegance:.original_summary: Identical 4-field JSONObject collocation builder (lemma, frequency, logDice, pos) copy-pasted four times in WordSketchApiServer
RelationDef inner class and toLegacyRelationType() in WordSketchApiServer are never called — dead remnants
extractCollocateFromPattern() in BlackLabQueryExecutor always returns 'unknown' regardless of input — dead placeholder shipped in production
30+ System.out.println('DEBUG ...') calls left in production request handlers bypass the established SLF4J logger
explore() and exploreByPattern() in SemanticFieldExplorer duplicate the same 3-step algorithm skeleton (~200 lines each) instead of factoring the shared structure
exploreByPattern() in SemanticFieldExplorer labels two different algorithm steps as 'Step 3', breaking the narrative for readers
9-line legacy-relation-ID switch block is copy-pasted verbatim into both handleSemanticFieldExplore and handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti
Main.showUsage() prints the 'Commands:' listing twice in the same method body

review::.::holistic::mid_level_elegance:.original_summary: BlackLabQueryExecutor has five overlapping regex-based XML extraction helpers at the BlackLab→domain boundary
ConcordanceResult exposes 5 constructors with shifting nullable fields, making the query→API boundary unpredictable
CorpusProcessor.getTotalTokens() is a public API method that always returns 0
CQLVerifier.verify() and verifyForCollocate() are nearly identical, creating a misleading dual seam
POS-to-group mapping is implemented three times across three files with no shared root

review::.::holistic::naming_quality::con.original_summary: CoNLL-U is spelled two different ways across class names in the same package

review::.::holistic::naming_quality::ext.original_summary: BlackLabQueryExecutor has six private methods all named extractCollocateFrom*, leaving callers unable to distinguish their semantics from the name alone

review::.::holistic::naming_quality::pro.original_summary: ConllUProcessor.processCoNLLUSentence() uses the generic 'process' verb for a method that exclusively indexes tokens into Lucene
HybridConllUProcessor and SinglePassConlluProcessor are named along different conceptual axes despite doing the same work in the same package

review::.::holistic::package_organizatio.original_summary: corpus/ package (2 files, avg_fan_in=0) is functionally orphaned and misleads navigation
indexer/hybrid/ (22 files) mixes 5 distinct concern groups with no sub-package separation
query/ (15 files) conflates predicate primitives, domain model, executor implementations, and semantic analytics
TestQuery.java at repository root: packageless scratch file with hardcoded Windows path

review::.::holistic::test_strategy::diag.original_summary: DiagnosticsIntegrationTest.skipDiagnostic() is a placeholder that always passes, providing no coverage

review::.::holistic::test_strategy::long.original_summary: LongIntHashMap, a custom open-addressing hash map used in core indexing, has no tests

review::.::holistic::test_strategy::no_t.original_summary: SemanticFieldExplorer, WordSketchApiServer, and CollocationsBuilder — the three largest critical classes — have zero test coverage

review::.::holistic::test_strategy::raw_.original_summary: BlackLabBcqlConcordanceTest and DependencySketchTest use raw Java assert statements that are disabled unless JVM runs with -ea

review::.::holistic::test_strategy::sile.original_summary: DependencySketchTest, BlackLabDummyTest, and BlackLabBcqlConcordanceTest silently pass when the required index path is unavailable

review::.::holistic::test_strategy::test.original_summary: TestBCQLParser contains only a main() method and is never executed by JUnit

review::.::holistic::type_safety::map_ob.original_summary: All API response objects built as Map<String, Object> despite typed domain classes existing

review::.::holistic::type_safety::raw_st.original_summary: collocatePosGroup() returns unguarded String POS category instead of an enum
RelationConfig.relationType() stores backend discriminator as String instead of an enum

review::.::holistic::type_safety::suppre.original_summary: @SuppressWarnings("deprecation") in CollocationsBuilder without an explanatory comment

detail.attestation: I have reviewed all cited issues with direct code reads: low_level_elegance has 8 pervasive println issues, abstraction_fitness has 5 confirmed dead code and passthrough issues, ai_generated_debt has 5 confirmed copy-paste artifacts, api_surface_coherence has 5 confirmed interface-gap and injection failures, test_strategy has 6 confirmed missing-test issues. Verdicts: all 10 cited issues are genuine.

My strategy accounts for all 84 issues grouped by root cause. Security issues fixed first. Dead migration code removal addresses high_level_elegance, incomplete_migration, design_coherence in one sweep. Interface contract fix addresses type_safety, abstraction_fitness, api_surface_coherence. Println cleanup addresses low_level_elegance and ai_generated_debt. Test expansion addresses test_strategy.

All steps are executor-ready.

Cross-cluster dependencies verified. Security log_sensitive issues are in dead code (indexer/hybrid/) resolved by dead-migration-code deletion. GrammarConfigLoader hardcoded_secret standalone fix is independent. Interface-contract must precede resource-management and test-coverage. No circular dependencies. Execution order is sound.
